backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for a study room app, including user profile management, room creation/joining, WebRTC signaling, and role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two connection/timeout-related features to their relevant frontend files and components, with high confidence test linkages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and page in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Studyroom app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for login, lobby, and room pages, with the index route redirecting to `/login` by default.
frontend/src/components/auth/ConnectionE: Modal dialog displayed on connection timeout, offering the user options to retry the connection or return to the login screen.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Blocking modal that prompts new users to set a username on first login before accessing the app, submitting the profile with zero XP via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component that handles authentication state, routing redirects (login/lobby), displays the app header with user info, and renders modals for profile setup and connection errors.
frontend/src/components/room/AmbientSoun: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a component to toggle ambient sounds in a study room.
frontend/src/components/room/CameraPrevi: Camera preview component that requests webcam access via getUserMedia, manages permission states (idle, requesting, active, denied, error), and renders the video feed or appropriate error UI.
frontend/src/components/room/ChatPanel.t: Local-only chat panel component for a study room that displays messages in a scrollable list and allows sending messages via input or Enter key.
frontend/src/components/room/Distraction: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a component indicating distraction-lock status in a study room.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalComplet: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a modal or prompt shown when a user completes their study goal.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalDisplay: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a component that displays the current study goal.
frontend/src/components/room/GoalEntryMo: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a modal component where users enter their study goal.
frontend/src/components/room/GratitudeCa: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a component displaying a gratitude or motivational card.
frontend/src/components/room/Leaderboard: Leaderboard panel that fetches XP profiles for all room participants and displays them ranked with medal icons, highlighting the current user.
frontend/src/components/room/Participant: Displays a list of current room participants with avatar initials, highlights the current user, and shows a camera icon for participants with active video streams.
frontend/src/components/room/ScratchCard: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a scratch-card reward overlay component.
frontend/src/components/room/TimerDispla: Simple elapsed-time timer component that counts up from zero in seconds and displays the time in HH:MM:SS or MM:SS format.
frontend/src/components/room/VideoGrid.t: Renders a responsive grid of video tiles for local and remote WebRTC streams, showing blurred video with name labels, a live indicator, and empty placeholder tiles for participants without active streams.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
Custom hook that tracks whether a connection attempt has exceeded a 15-second timeout, exposing a flag and a reset function.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor using React Query.
Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for room creation/joining, storing chat events, fetching room participants, and awarding XP via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Custom hook that provides a mutation to save the caller's user profile to the backend and invalidates the cached profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebRTC.ts: Custom hook that manages WebRTC peer connections for a room, handling offer/answer signaling and ICE candidate exchange via polling the backend actor, and tracking remote media streams.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines a dark-mode-only design system using Tailwind, custom OKLCH color tokens, gradient/glow variables, and component utility classes for cards, buttons, and video tiles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page where authenticated users can create a new study room or join an existing one by entering a room code, displaying the user's username and XP.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, shows app features, displays a connection timeout modal if login stalls, and redirects to the lobby once authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/RoomPage.tsx: Study room page that manages local/remote video streams via WebRTC, awards XP every 30 minutes, and renders chat, participant list, leaderboard, and timer panels.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom design tokens including oklch/hsl color palettes (teal, amber, surface), custom fonts, border radii, shadows, gradients, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request targeting an indefinite 'connecting' screen bug in the app's authentication/actor initialization flow, with two existing features tracking the investigation/fix and a timeout mechanism.
